title: مرسوم بقانون رقم (24) لسنة 1981 بالموافقة على النظام الاساسي لمجلس التعاون لدول الخليج العربية
title_en: Decree No. (20) of 1981 approving the Guarantee of the State of Bahrain's Share in the Loan Convention concluded on 11 June 1981, between Gulf Air and a Group of Banks to Finance the Purchase of Rolls-Royce Engines and Spare Parts for the Tristar Aircraft
